title: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple(அம்பல் பிரமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ambal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple(அம்பல் பிரமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ambal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the place is known as Koilpatthu. The historical name of the place is Punnakavanam. The presiding deity Shiva is worshipped as Brahmapureeswarar and his consort Parvati as Poonguzhalammai.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirumalam
topPlaces.description: Agarathirumalam is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Enangudi
topPlaces.description: Enangudi is the main village which is unified with neighbouring villages like Adalaiyur, Karipakkam, Ketharimangalam, Putthagaram, Kayathoor, Karuppuoor, Thepiramangalam, Vawvaladi and Pakkam Kottor. The nearest town of significant size is Tiruvarur which is 16 km away, Mayiladuthurai is 30 km and Nagapattinam is around 28 km away.

topPlaces.name: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Koothanur in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Saraswathi, the Hindu goddess of learning.

topPlaces.name: Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur
topPlaces.description: Agnipureeswarar Temple (also called Thirupugalur temple) in Thirupugalur, a village in Nagapattinam district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in the Tamil style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 10th century.

topPlaces.name: Polagam, Karaikal
topPlaces.description: Polagam is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 8 kilometres south-west of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres south of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

topPlaces.name: Adhalaiyur
topPlaces.description: Adhalaiyur is a village in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu State of India.

topPlaces.name: Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple
topPlaces.description: Mudikondan Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Lord Rama, the seventh avatar of Lord Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Alangudi, Nannilam
topPlaces.description: Alangudi is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ambal Brahmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Agarathirumalam, Enangudi, Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple, Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur, Polagam, Karaikal.
